note: Human verification of review-queue items. A SEPARATE, additive record: it does NOT modify the sealed forecast, the origin counts, the bankroll, or any bet. Verification can add origins; it never asserts them. The dashboard overlays this onto the matching human-review item for display only.

items.summary: Kevin Holland withdrew with a training injury. The bout was removed from UFC Oklahoma City and the promotion is not seeking a short-notice replacement for Jacobe Smith. The Kalshi market finalized on 2026-07-13 — the market already acted, so there is nothing to bet. Being right about a withdrawal pays nothing.
